title: Frequent traveler timezone truth LifeOpsBench pack

notes: Executable scenarios live in scenarios/traveler_timezone.py and scenarios/live/traveler_timezone.py.
The Scenario dataclass has no tier field in this checkout, so tier is represented by description markers and this catalog metadata.
Registered in the LifeOpsBench static and live scenario registries in this PR.

scenarios.title: Fixed instant call reminder survives timezone changes
scenarios.coverage: Explicit UTC call reminder stays tied to a fixed instant regardless of later travel.

scenarios.title: Local wall-clock wake reminder follows current city
scenarios.coverage: Daily 7am wake reminder follows the traveler's active local timezone instead of collapsing to one UTC instant.

scenarios.title: Ambiguous '9am Tuesday' reminder must clarify timezone before creating
scenarios.coverage: Ambiguous timezone reminder must ask which zone before creating the reminder.

scenarios.title: Capture Singapore stay as timezone owner fact, not a task
scenarios.coverage: Travel window is saved as context for future morning anchors rather than turned into a reminder.

scenarios.title: Pre-trip lighter load preference is a policy
scenarios.coverage: Pre-trip load-lightening is recorded as a scheduling preference rather than a one-off task.

scenarios.title: Flag meeting that lands in biological night
scenarios.coverage: Meeting creation must surface that 6pm Singapore resolves to 3am San Francisco body time.

scenarios.title: Capture a messy SFO-NRT-SIN-SFO itinerary
scenarios.coverage: Messy multi-city travel dump is captured as itinerary context for later timezone behavior.

scenarios.title: Record and recall timezone history for the month
scenarios.coverage: Timezone history is logged as owner context for later recall and scheduling interpretation.

scenarios.title: Re-anchor local reminder after travel timezone changes
scenarios.coverage: Mid-conversation city change re-anchors local-wall-clock reminder while preserving a fixed UTC reminder.

scenarios.title: Build a safe jet-lag pre-shift plan
scenarios.coverage: Jet-lag plan gives timed light and sleep-shift guidance while avoiding medication dosage or medical advice.

scenarios.title: Recover the day plan after an airline delay
scenarios.coverage: Airline delay message forces active replanning of dinner, prep time, and hotel check-in.

scenarios.title: Adversarial: must not silently guess absolute-vs-local semantic
scenarios.coverage: Reminder request explicitly lacks a usable timezone anchor and must not be created before clarification.

scenarios.title: Flag a meeting conflict across stated timezones
scenarios.coverage: Two meetings stated in different local zones conflict only after conversion to a shared reference time.

scenarios.title: Re-anchor daily items across three trip legs
scenarios.coverage: Week-long three-zone trip keeps daily local items per city while preserving fixed-instant commitments.

scenarios.title: Ground current time across caller cities
scenarios.coverage: Current local times are grounded for San Francisco, Berlin, and Seoul using benchmark now_iso.

scenarios.title: Queue VIP message while in flight and surface on landing
scenarios.coverage: Urgent VIP message arriving in flight is queued and surfaced after landing instead of lost or prematurely handled.
scenarios.adversarialTrap: Lost VIP message during unreachable window

scenarios.title: Return home without stale destination timezone assumptions
scenarios.coverage: Post-trip morning planning returns to America/Los_Angeles rather than stale Singapore time.

scenarios.title: Negotiate a lighter pre-trip schedule
scenarios.coverage: Assistant identifies candidate pre-trip deferrals, negotiates approval, and preserves high-priority commitments.
